description: 3-Axis, ±2 g/±4 g/±8 g/±16 g Digital Accelerometer

bits.name: DEVID
bits.description: Fixed device ID code of 0xE5 (345 octal).

registers.name: BW_RATE
registers.description: Data rate and power mode control

bits.name: LOW_POWER
bits.description: 0 = Normal operation, 1 = Reduced power operation.

bits.name: Rate
bits.description: Selects device bandwidth and output data rate. Default is 0x0A (100 Hz).

bits.name: Link
bits.description: 1 = Delays activity function until inactivity is detected.

bits.name: AUTO_SLEEP
bits.description: 1 = Enables auto-sleep functionality.

bits.name: Measure
bits.description: 0 = Standby mode, 1 = Measurement mode.

bits.name: Sleep
bits.description: 0 = Normal mode, 1 = Sleep mode.

bits.name: Wakeup
bits.description: Controls frequency of readings in sleep mode (00=8Hz, 01=4Hz, 10=2Hz, 11=1Hz).

bits.name: SELF_TEST
bits.description: 1 = Applies a self-test force to the sensor.

bits.name: SPI
bits.description: 1 = 3-wire SPI mode, 0 = 4-wire SPI mode.

bits.name: INT_INVERT
bits.description: 0 = Interrupts active high, 1 = Interrupts active low.

bits.name: FULL_RES
bits.description: 1 = Full resolution mode (4 mg/LSB), 0 = 10-bit mode.

bits.name: Justify
bits.description: 1 = Left-justified (MSB) mode, 0 = Right-justified mode with sign extension.

bits.name: DATAX0
bits.description: Least significant byte of X-axis output data.

bits.name: DATAX1
bits.description: Most significant byte of X-axis output data.

bits.name: DATAY0
bits.description: Least significant byte of Y-axis output data.

bits.name: DATAY1
bits.description: Most significant byte of Y-axis output data.

bits.name: DATAZ0
bits.description: Least significant byte of Z-axis output data.

bits.name: DATAZ1
bits.description: Most significant byte of Z-axis output data.

bits.name: FIFO_MODE
bits.description: 00 = Bypass, 01 = FIFO, 10 = Stream, 11 = Trigger.

bits.name: Trigger
bits.description: 0 = Links trigger event to INT1, 1 = Links trigger event to INT2.

bits.name: Samples
bits.description: Specifies how many FIFO entries are needed to trigger a watermark interrupt or are retained before a trigger event.

bits.name: FIFO_TRIG
bits.description: 1 = Trigger event occurred, 0 = No trigger event occurred.

bits.name: Entries
bits.description: Reports how many data values are stored in FIFO.

scripts.name: Standard-Initialisierung
scripts.description: Aktiviert den ADXL345 im Messmodus (±2 g, Full Resolution, 100 Hz Ausgaberate)

scripts.name: Device ID prüfen
scripts.description: Liest DEVID-Register und bricht ab, wenn der Wert nicht 0xE5 ist

scripts.name: Achsenwerte lesen
scripts.description: Liest X-, Y- und Z-Beschleunigungswerte (je 16-bit signed)
